title: Pollia secundiflora
taxonomy: Pollia secundiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified in the kingdom Plantae, and its full botanical name is Pollia secundiflora. Within the family Commelinaceae, it belongs to the genus Pollia. The classification of Pollia secundiflora is further refined by its scientific name, which is universally recognized as Pollia secundiflora.

intro: Pollia secundiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae, commonly known as the "many-flowered Pollia". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
